label: 1575 CE
era_summary: Year 1575 (MDLXXV) was a common year starting on Saturday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1575: France, Switzerland-Venice, 1575. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
